arts.ttl: Flick tells Barça ‘what to do better’ after Celta draw
arts.sum: There are many things we can do better with and without the ball, and that’s what we’re focusing on. It’s a young team and during the season it’s normal to have some situations like that.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick provides Barcelona return date for injured Lamine Yamal
arts.sum: Barcelona's talismanic teenager Lamine Yamal has been sidelined for three weeks with an ankle problem.

arts.ttl: FC Barcelona 25-26 Champions League Training Kit Leaked
arts.sum: The Barcelona kit expert @memorabilia1899 has shared early images of FC Barcelona's new 25-26 Champions League training kit.

arts.ttl: Flick says Yamal could return to Barça squad for Las Palmas clash
arts.sum: Barcelona face French side Brest in their fifth Champions League League Phase match on Tuesday and will be without their teenage superstar once again as Lamine Yamal will miss a third consecutive game due to an ankle injury. The Blaugrana lost to Real Sociedad and dropped two points against Celta Vigo in the first two games without Yamal, and will be looking to finally get a victory with Lamine not involved.

arts.ttl: What is Barcelona’s biggest win of all time?
arts.sum: The Catalans' illustrious history is peppered with memorable victories, including the clashes which have helped clinch their five Champions League titles. Their first 10-1 victory took place in 1949 in a La Liga clash against Gimnastico de Tarragona, while they battered Basconia by the same scoreline in the last 16 phase of the 1962 Copa Generalissimo.
Aidan Perkins looks ahead to all 18 games in the Champions League this week and has a score prediction for each clash.
